data.title: Booking Holdings Inc. to Present at the Barclays 18th Annual Americas Select Conference
data.description: Norwalk, Connecticut - On April 21, 2026, Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) declared that their Chief Financial Officer, Ewout Steenbergen, will engage in a fireside conversation at the Barclays 18th Annual Americas Select Conference in London. The session is scheduled for May 5th at 10:45 am CET.

data.title: SOLOWIN HOLDINGS Expects Revenue in the Range of $27 Million to $29 Million, Approximately 10x Year-over-Year Growth for the Fiscal Year Ended March 31, 2026 Based on Preliminary Unaudited Results
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Hong Kong-based Solowin Holdings (Nasdaq: AXG) revealed preliminary unaudited financial results for the fiscal year ending on March 31. Solowin, a prominent financial technology company connecting traditional and digital assets, shared key information about its performance during that period.

data.title: FS Bancorp, Inc. Reports First Quarter Net Income of $7.8 Million or $1.02 Per Diluted Share and Declares 53rd Consecutive Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: Mountlake Terrace, Washington, on April 21, 2026: FS Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSBW), the parent company of 1st Security Bank of Washington, disclosed that their net income for the first quarter of 2026 amounted to $7.8 million, translating to $1.02 per diluted share. This figure saw a slight decline from the preceding quarter where it stood at $8.4 million, or $1.10 per diluted share, and a marginal drop from $8.0 million, or $1.01 per diluted share, during the same period last year. The pre-tax income for Q1 2026 was reported as $9.9 million, indicating a $440,000 increase (4.6%) from the $9.5 million registered in Q1 2025. The variance in net income between the two quarters is primarily attributed to a higher effective income tax rate.

data.title: Dana to Pay Dividend on Common Stock
data.description: In Maumee, Ohio, on April 21, 2026, Dana Incorporated (NYSE: DAN) disclosed that their board of directors approved a common stock dividend. The board sanctioned a quarterly dividend worth $0.12 per share, to be distributed on May 29, 2026, to shareholders of Dana common stock recorded as of May 8...

data.title: Ascendis Announces Redemption of All $575 Million of Outstanding 2.25% Convertible Senior Notes Due 2028
data.description: Ascendis Pharma A/S (Nasdaq: ASND) made an announcement today in Copenhagen, Denmark, stating its decision to call all $575.0 million aggregate principal amount of its outstanding 2.25% Convertible Senior Notes due 2028 for redemption on May 6, 2026. The notes can be identified through CUSIP No. 04351P AD3 / ISIN No. US04351PAD33. This redemption action is based on Ascendis' redemption right as outlined in Section 4.03(B) of the indenture entered into on March 29, 2022, between Ascendis and U.S. Bank Trust Company, National Association, as trustee. The trigger for this redemption right was met as the last reported sale price per ordinary share surpassed 130% of the conversion price for at least 20 trading days within the 30 consecutive trading day period ending on April 21, 2026.

data.title: Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation Issues Correction to Press Release Dated April 21, 2026
data.description: On April 21, 2026 in Winnemucca, Nevada, Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation (Nasdaq: HYMC) provided a correction to its previous press release regarding engaging an engineering firm to evaluate underground mining options. The Company issued the correction to clarify the information contained in the earlier announcement.

data.title: STERIS to Host a Conference Call for Fiscal 2026 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results on May 12, 2026
data.description: In Dublin, Ireland on April 21, 2026, STERIS plc (NYSE: STE) revealed plans to conduct a conference call to review its fiscal 2026 fourth quarter and full-year performance at 9:00 a.m. ET on May 12, 2026. Interested parties can participate in the live call via www.steris-ir.com or by phone at 1-833-535-2199 in the US or 1-412-902-6776 internationally, requesting access to the STERIS plc conference call.

data.title: Veeco Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Conference Call
data.description: Veeco Instruments Inc., a company traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol VECO, is set to announce its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on May 5, 2026, after the market closes. The company will conduct a conference call at 5:00 PM ET on the same day to discuss these results.

data.title: BJ’s Restaurants, Inc. Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: On April 21, 2026, BJ's Restaurants, Inc. (NASDAQ: BJRI) announced its plan to disclose the first quarter 2026 results on May 5, 2026, after the market closes. The company will conduct an investor conference call on the same day at 2:00 p.m. (Pacific Time), which will be broadcasted live on the internet. To access the conference call, individuals should go to the "Investors" section of BJ's Restaurants, Inc. website at http://www.bjsrestaurants.com a few minutes before the call to register and download necessary audio software. A recording of the presentation will be accessible for 30 days post the call.

data.title: Fennec Pharmaceuticals Announces Acceptance of Abstracts at the 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting
data.description: The latest research from four studies highlights the increasing clinical concern over the rise in cases of cisplatin-induced hearing loss among patients. The studies shed light on the urgent need to address this issue, considering its lasting impact on individuals. Cisplatin-induced hearing loss has become a significant concern, with a reported increase of 15% in affected patients over the past five years. This issue not only affects the quality of life for those undergoing cisplatin-based treatment but also presents long-term challenges. The research underscores the importance of early detection and intervention to mitigate the effects of this prevalent side effect in cancer treatment.

data.title: BioMarin Announces Board Leadership Transition
data.description: Ian T. Clark has been elected as the Chair of the Board at BioMarin Pharmaceutical Inc., replacing Richard A. Meier who is set to retire. This decision was made public on April 21, 2026, by the company based in San Rafael, California. BioMarin Pharmaceutical Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol BMRN. The appointment of Ian T. Clark is pending his official election at the upcoming...

data.title: WesBanco Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: WesBanco, Inc. reported a 22 basis points increase in net interest margin compared to the previous year. The company, listed on Nasdaq as WSBC, expanded into South Florida, showcasing advanced organic growth. This diversified bank holding company, based in Wheeling, West Virginia, made this announcement on April 21, 2026.
Atlantic American Corporation Receives Nasdaq Notice Regarding Delayed Form 10-K Filing

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Duke Energy/
data.description: Duke Energy lineworkers recently enhanced their abilities at the Carolinas Lineman's regional rodeo. The event took place on 21-Apr-2026 and was organized by Duke Energy to support their staff. The competition aimed to sharpen the skills of lineworkers, promoting reliability in power services. Duke Energy confirmed that adjustments were made to improve the event. This initiative showcased the dedication of lineworkers and emphasized the company's commitment to excellence in the field. The regional rodeo saw participation from a significant number of lineworkers and highlighted the importance of ongoing training in maintaining reliable power supply.

data.title: FHLBank Chicago Announces Q1 2026 Financial Highlights
data.description: In Chicago, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Chicago (FHLBank Chicago) revealed its preliminary financial results for Q1 2026. President and CEO Michael Ericson highlighted the bank's role as a dependable liquidity source for members amidst market unpredictability. Through disciplined balance sheet management and robust capital levels, the bank successfully handled rising member demand. The financial report remains unaudited and showcases the bank's commitment to supporting its members' financial needs in challenging times.

data.title: Cadre Holdings Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.10 Per Share
data.description: Cadre Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CDRE), a leading company in safety equipment manufacturing for various markets, has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share ($0.40 annually). The dividend will be paid on May 15, 2026, to shareholders of record.

data.title: Boise Cascade Company First Quarter 2026 Earnings Webcast and Conference Call
data.description: Boise Cascade Company (NYSE: BCC) has announced that they will be conducting a webcast and conference call to address their first quarter 2026 earnings on May 5, 2026, at 11 a.m. Eastern Time. Those interested in joining the webcast can access it via the Investor section of their website at www.bc.com/investors and choosing the Event Calendar link. For analysts and investors who want to participate in the Q&A session, registration for the call is required. The archived version of the webcast will also be accessible in the Investors section of Boise Cascade’s website.

data.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. Announces May 2026 Dividend Rate Per Common Share
data.description: In VERO BEACH, Florida on April 21, 2026, ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. declared the May 2026 cash dividend for its Common Stock. The company, listed as NYSE: ARR and ARR-PRC, disclosed this information.

data.title: Amrize Shareholders Approve All Proposals at 2026 Annual General Meeting
data.description: At its inaugural Annual General Meeting, Amrize (AMRZ) received approval on all agendas from shareholders in Chicago and Zug, Switzerland. Among the decisions was the authorization of a unique, one-time dividend for the year 2025, amounting to $0.44 per share. This dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on May 4, 2026, to all eligible shareholders. To qualify for this distribution, shareholders must hold the shares by April 23, 2026, the cum-dividend date. On April 24, 2026, the shares will be listed ex-dividend, marking the record date for shareholders.

data.title: Zscaler Wins 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award for Security in the Application Category
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Zscaler, Inc. was awarded the 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award for Security in the Application category. Listed on NASDAQ as ZS, Zscaler is known for cloud security services. The award recognizes the success of their Zero Trust Exchange™ platform, which collaborates with Google's AI infrastructure to offer autonomous data protection for users and applications. Zscaler specializes in securing Google workloads, offering DLP for Workspace users, and integrating with Google SecOps and the Vertex AI platform.
